mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement(title, content, status, is_pinned, created_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{isPinned}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.is_pinned, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_at, ad.username AS created_by_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN admin ad ON ad.id = a.created_by WHERE a.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.is_pinned, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_at, ad.username AS created_by_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN admin ad ON ad.id = a.created_by WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.is_pinned DESC, a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.is_pinned, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_at, ad.username AS created_by_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN admin ad ON ad.id = a.created_by WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.is_pinned DESC, a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM announcement WHERE status = 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.is_pinned, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_at, ad.username AS created_by_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN admin ad ON ad.id = a.created_by ORDER BY a.is_pinned DESC, a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1
UPDATE announcement SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
